channel.title: GitHub Objective-C++ Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Objective-C++ in GitHub

item.title: TextureGroup/Texture
item.description: Smooth asynchronous user interfaces for iOS apps.

item.title: mrousavy/react-native-mmkv
item.description: ⚡️ An extremely fast key/value storage library for React Native. ~30x faster than AsyncStorage!

item.title: mapbox/mapbox-gl-native-ios
item.description: Interactive, thoroughly customizable maps for iOS powered by vector tiles and OpenGL

item.title: textmate/textmate
item.description: TextMate is a graphical text editor for macOS 10.12 or later

item.title: avibrazil/RDM
item.description: Easily set Mac Retina display to higher unsupported resolutions

item.title: KhronosGroup/MoltenVK
item.description: MoltenVK is a Vulkan Portability implementation. It layers a subset of the high-performance, industry-standard Vulkan graphics and compute API over Apple's Metal graphics framework, enabling Vulkan applications to run on iOS and macOS.

item.title: yasirkula/UnityNativeGallery
item.description: A native Unity plugin to interact with Gallery/Photos on Android & iOS (save and/or load images/videos)
